text: ShotPro Reddit free-makeover AUTOMATION — build the BATCH MAKEOVER half (pairs with Karen's tasks/T-031/reddit_scout.py which writes tasks/T-031/leads.jsonl). Write tasks/T-031/makeover_batch.py: read leads.jsonl, for each lead download image_url, POST it to the ShotPro generator for 2 styles (studio_white + marble_luxury) by calling the running ShotPro app (env SHOTPRO_URL, default http://localhost:5055, endpoint /api/generate with multipart product=<file> style=<id>). Build a side-by-side before/after PNG (PIL: original | result | result) and write to ~/shared-review/reddit-makeovers/<author>__<threadid>.png. Also write a ready-to-post helpful comment draft .txt next to it (friendly, no hard sell: 'Saw you wanted to sharpen your main image — ran yours through a couple of styles, free, yours to keep. Happy to do the rest if useful.'). Produce an index.md listing each: thread_url + image path + draft path, for the human to post MANUALLY. ⚠️ generate+draft only, NEVER auto-post. CLI: python3 makeover_batch.py. Add README. Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Mini -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Mini] T-031 makeover batch' && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Mini] done: T-031 makeover_batch.py'.
